# Fire Sword
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Fire%20Sword&prop=wikitext

{{Infobox_item|title = Fire Sword|imagecaption = fire sword|type = Sword|effects = +1.5% lootboost
|buy = 200 fame|sell = 200 fame
}}[[File:T5_Fire_Sword.png|thumb|Fire Sword]] 
Fire Sword t5

==Details==

Fire swords are well known for their meme , which is how they increase loot boost . on revenge on the fallen they give 1.5% lootboost each


The best place to farm Fire Sword's are Abyss', since the minions have a higher chance to drop them.
